title: [CLAP] Cream Lemon - 06 [Uncensored][680C24CE].mkv
description:
Another quality release from your friends at the Cream Lemon Archival Project!

It is our goal to preserve the original 1984 Cream Lemon series without interference from Japanese censorship. We are combining softsubbed translations from LamonAE, Japanese video sources, along with newly-uncovered and restored video sources from the United States and Brazil to create new softsubbed and uncensored MKV releases of as many of the original Cream Lemon episodes as we can get our hands on.

Yes, we know we were supposed to release episode 11 uncensored as our next release, but we were suddenly contacted by another collector and offered the uncensored "Sonata Proibida" tape from Everest Video do Brasil, and we couldn't say no! A v2 of episode 2 will be coming out soon using this new material to minimize use of that old awful 240p rip. Approximately 30-40 shots needed to be replaced for this release, whether it was DVD to LaserDisc, or down to Brazilian footage. Today's episode is episode 6: Escalation Part 2 Forbidden Sonata, starring those same sluts from episode 2. This one's a huge fest of whips and bondage, folks!

Special thanks to elgringo for sending me the original script used by LamonAE and allowing us to use it softsubbed in this release! Special thanks to Mauricio Hunter for the donation of episodes 2 and 6 uncensored!

BIG SUPER ULTRA MEGA EXTREME special thanks goes to Achoron, AlphaSigma, and the team at MuchoHentai.com for donating well over $400 to allow us to acquire these rare tapes!

Want to help restore the footage, provide new sources for us to use and restore, or work on the scripts? Join our Discord server!

**Video sources:** Japanese DVD, Japanese LD, Uncensored Brazilian “Sonhos Molhados” VHS
**Audio sources**: Japanese DVD, Japanese LD (intro only)
**Subtitles:** QC’d LamonAE Subtitles (courtesy of elgringo)

title: [桜都字幕组]2020年8月合集
description:
本月沿用了7月份的处理手段和压制参数，在保持了良好的细节还原度的同时，进一步将软字幕版的分辨率提升到1080P。此外，制作了视频章节封装于所有视频中，方便播放时定位。

软字幕版采用了HEVC 10Bit YUV444编码，主要编码参数: crf=15, aq-mode=1, aq-strength=0.8, rd=5, psy-rd=2, psy-rdoq=1, qcomp=0.75, cbqpoffs=2, crqpoffs=2.
采用专门为软字幕版优化的字体子集化技术，软字幕版内封子集化字幕和子集化字体，因此无需外挂字幕或安装字体即可观看.

硬字幕版采用了AVC 8Bit YUV420编码，主要编码参数: crf=19, aq-mode=3, aq-strength=0.8, psy-rd=0:0.20,–ref 6, --bframes 7, --qcomp 0.7, --fgo 1, --fade-compensate 0.4.

字幕和字体均可单独下载。

欢迎各位进行报错反馈。
